REPLY ISO MTN TO STRIKE X-DEFT LEONARD HO'S ANSWER TO SFUSD X-COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

LAW AND MOTION 302, THIS CASE IS CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES WITH CASE NUMBER 525013 (SANCHEZ VS. HO) NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-DEFENDANT LEONARDO HO'S ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED NO AUTHORITY REQUIRING THAT A VERIFIED ANSWER BE MADE TO THE SCHOOL DISTRICT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 446 APPLIES TO PUBLIC AGENCIES AS "PLAINTIFFS." ALTHOUGH THE TERMS "COMPLAINT"AND "CROSS-COMPLAINT" ARE DEFINED AS INTERCHANGEABLE OR INCLUSIVE IN SOME PARTS OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE (E.G., CCP 429.30 AND CCP 438), PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CITED TO AN APPLICABLE REFERENCE FOR SECTION 446. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Eric M. Abramson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff: Hui Xia Li aka Fay Li, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Sabrina Chin present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $100,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $17,835.84 payable to Law Firm of Abramson Smith Waldsmith, LLP
Costs: $29,819.47
A net balance of $52,344.69 to be deposited into a structured settlement annuity at:
until Minor reaches the age of 18 years with payouts annually through 08/01/2028.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into structured settlement annuity.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 2/11/2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into structured settlement annuity.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

This case is consolidated for all purposes with Case Number 525013 (Sanchez vs. Ho)
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-DEFENDANT LEONARDO HO'S ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Denied. Plaintiff has provided no authority requiring that a verified answer be made to the School District's Cross-Complaint. Code of Civil Procedure section 446 applies to public agencies as "plaintiffs." Although the terms "complaint"and "cross-complaint" are defined as interchangeable or inclusive in some parts of the Code of Civil Procedure (e.g., CCP 429.30 and CCP 438), Plaintiff has not cited to an applicable reference for section 446. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
